title: Web Design 101: Free Full Course
description:
Learn how to design a website from scratch.

In this course you’ll learn everything you need to create a beautiful, fully functional custom website from start to finish.

We decided to teach Web Design for free in 2020, to those who are using quarantine to make a change in their lives, to those who can't afford a web design course right now or to those that simply want to learn a new skill.

In 2024, we released a brand new 3-hour web design course for beginners, to give you an overview of the whole process. 

.
.
.
.
.
free web design course online 2022, best web design course 2022, how to design a website from scratch 2022, web design free course 2022, learn web design online, free web design course 2022, introduction to web design 2022, web design tutorial 2022, free graphic design course, free web design course, web graphic design, how to design websites

title: LEARN FREE MUSIC THEORY
description:
This is a full, indepth music theory course, completely for free. Designed to start from the very basics of music theory and continue forward. There is homework assigned at the end of each lesson so you can follow along and learn music theory for yourself! I also try to make it as fun and upbeat as possible so that you won't fall asleep or get board! 

Visit my website to see extra info and course outlines:  http://www.howtoplaypiano.ca
